mypackage.base module¶

Base module with a generic pydantic model.

class mypackage.base.IBase¶

Bases: BaseModel, Generic

A generic pydantic base using PEP 695 type parameter syntax.

abstractmethod create_state() → TState¶

Create a state instance.

model_config = {'frozen': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class mypackage.base.IBase¶

Bases: BaseModel, Generic

A generic pydantic base using PEP 695 type parameter syntax.

abstractmethod create_state() → TState¶

Create a state instance.

model_config = {'frozen': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class mypackage.base.IState¶

Bases: object

Marker interface for state objects.
